items.claim: Fared Berat is fighting an opponent who is not UFC caliber.
items.quote: he's fighting a short notice guy who was not UFC caliber.

items.claim: Mario Batista's previous submission loss to Cory Sandhagen will not repeat because it was his UFC debut on short notice.
items.quote: That was seven years ago. Mario's UFC debut on short notice. That's not going to happen here.

items.claim: Adrien Yanz has a high frequency of decision victories.
items.quote: he's got plenty of decisions. He has a [ __ ] ton of decisions.

items.claim: Cody Duran has been knocked out in the first round previously.
items.quote: wins by knockout in the first round which has happened to Cody Deran before

items.claim: Max Holloway is incapable of winning by submission.
Conor McGregor has never fought a five-round fight.
items.quote: When the hell have you seen Conor McGregor go five round?

items.claim: Terrence McKinney does not get past the first round in his fights.
items.quote: Terrence McKini doesn't get past the first round and if he does, it's for a minute.
